title: Dohazāri Heat Wave
lead: Dohazāri is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.49. This anomaly has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Dohazāri has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 14.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 64%, and the wind speed is approximately 12.9 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The absence of any Heating Degree Days (HDD) indicates that the temperature has remained consistently high, with no relief in sight.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this critical heat wave in Dohazāri.
